children.text: When did you realize you were an adult?
What is one personal passion that you couldn't live without?
If happiness was the national currency, what kind of job would make you rich?
If a fortune teller could accurately tell you one thing about the future, what would you ask them?
If you could sell years of your life for $1 million per year, how many years would you sell?
If you had an unlimited budget to create a single thing to improve the world, what would it be?
